Master HOA — Monthly Dues Schedule
Per-unit master HOA monthly dues across all units.

Unit ↕ Owner Name ↕ Closing Date ↕ Status Buyer Type Master HOA Due ↕ Condo HOA Due ↕ Combined
Master HOA — Monthly Charge Schedule
Prorated charges beginning November 2025. Developer pays from 10/17/2025 until closing date (exclusive). Owner pays from closing date through end of month.
Charge Schedule by Unit
Developer Charge Owner Charge
Condo HOA — Monthly Dues Schedule
Per-unit condo HOA monthly dues across all units.
Condo Dues per Unit
Unit Owner Name Closing Date Status Condo HOA Due Master HOA Due Combined
Condo HOA — Monthly Charge Schedule
Charges beginning March 2026. Developer pays for all units closed in March 2026 or later (upfront). Units closed prior to March 2026 show as full monthly charge to Owner.
Charge Schedule by Unit
Developer Charge Owner Charge
Flow House Leasing — Leaseback Program
All units enrolled in the Leaseback program with CLOSED status. Rent, dues, and net payment summary.
Leaseback Units
Unit Owner Name Buyer Type Closing Date Leaseback From Leaseback To Monthly Rent Condo HOA Master HOA Total Dues Net Monthly
Flow House Leasing — Payment Schedule
Non-Bulk: First payment 90 days from 1st of following month after closing, quarterly calendar cycle thereafter.  |  Bulk: First payment on 1st of following month after closing, covers 6 months, semi-annual calendar cycle thereafter.
Payment Schedule by Unit
Cadence: Quarterly (Non-Bulk) Semi-Annual (Bulk)
Unit Owner Name Type Leaseback From Leaseback To Payment Date Period Months Gross Rent Condo HOA Master HOA Total Dues Net Payment
